meaning: 卑尔根[挪威西南部港市]
examples: He was supposed to go back to Bergen on the last bus, but of course the accident prevented him.
He is also the father of actress Candice Bergen.
The next day, the Norwegian made it to Bergen.
The film, for which Bergen was the executive producer, was in the Sundance Film 2013 competition.
Bergen is currently writing a book about "homegrown" terrorism, which HBO is basing a forthcoming film on.
